name: Case Study: Ivan's Partner
history: Ongoing interpersonal difficulties involving a partner named Ivan and his family. Recent trust and betrayal issues involving Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid conflict to maintain relationships.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I express my true feelings, I will be abandoned.
coping_strategies: Avoiding confrontation and suppressing emotions to maintain peace.
situation: During an interaction with Ivan's family, the mother says 'boys will be boys' and asks the patient to 'forgive and forget'.
auto_thought: If I confront them, they will reject me.
